name: CREDIT ACCEPTANCE CORP
summary: General Credit Acceptance Corporation (referred to as the Company, Credit Acceptance, we, our or us) makes vehicle ownership possible by providing innovative financing solutions that enable automobile dealers to sell vehicles to consumers, regardless of their credit history.Our financing programs are offered through a nationwide network of automobile dealers who benefit from sales of vehicles to consumers who otherwise could not obtain financing; from repeat and referral sales generated by these...
